title: OmniNFT: Modality-wise Omni Diffusion Reinforcement for Joint Audio-Video Generation
core_claim: The paper proposes a modality-aware reinforcement learning framework for joint audio-video generation that routes advantages per modality, applies layer-wise gradient surgery, and reweights region-level losses to improve fidelity, alignment, and synchronization.
triage_rationale: The abstract describes a concrete method for a timely multimodal generation problem and names specific failure modes, which makes it worth reviewer attention. It is not yet clearly a must-advance paper because the evidence is limited to reported improvements on named benchmarks and the claims are method-centric rather than obviously field-defining.
likely_red_flags: Strong claims rely on benchmark improvements without any numbers in the abstract
The novelty may be incremental engineering around RL fine-tuning unless the experiments are unusually strong
No author affiliation or trusted-org signal to help prioritize
